name: NicoHood Arduino HID Gamepad (Generic)
notes: 78-byte descriptor. Source: NicoHood/HID SingleGamepad.cpp. Used by thousands of DIY/Arduino gamepad projects. 32 buttons, 4x16-bit axes (X/Y/Rx/Ry), 2x8-bit axes (Z/Rz), 2 hat switches. VID:PID shown is Arduino Leonardo default -- override as needed.
